hero.tagline1: We acquire and operate six sustainable D2C brands.
hero.tagline2: Hands-on. In parallel. As one team.

mission.label: MISSION
mission.block1: Most brands work in silos: marketing doesn't know the numbers. Data doesn't see the story. Operations get the trends too late.
mission.block2: We believe the next decade belongs to houses — not single brands. A team running six brands in parallel sees instantly what works in one — and can test it across the others.
mission.block3: HSB is that house. Six brands, one team, one shared method.

paths.title: Where do you want to go?

foundersUniversity.title: Founders University
foundersUniversity.hook: Build brands from the inside. 12-week fellowship.

ambassadors.title: Ambassador Program
ambassadors.hook: Sustainable brands, great samples, fair commissions.

ai.label: PYTHIA
ai.kicker: Named after the Oracle of Delphi.
ai.heading: An AI that spots trends — before they show up in reporting.
ai.paragraph: Pythia is our sister company — an independent AI business. It reads Google and Amazon searches in real time and surfaces movement early: category shifts, new searches, shifting buying intent.
ai.capability1: On acquisition checks, Pythia shows whether a brand has real tail-wind — or whether growth hangs on a single channel.
ai.capability2: Which categories are turning, which are cooling. Where it's worth evaluating a new brand investment — and where it isn't.

stub.description: This funnel is being built. Application form ships with Phase B.
